code:
def count_and_say(n: int) -> str:
    if n == 1:
        return "1"

    prev_term = count_and_say(n - 1)
    
    result = []
    i = 0
    while i < len(prev_term):
        char = prev_term[i]
        count = 0
        j = i
        while j < len(prev_term) and prev_term[j] == char:
            count += 1
            j += 1
        result.append(str(count))
        result.append(char)
        i = j
            
    return "".join(result)
